queries.question: Who is Linda Green's department head?
queries.sql: select M.Department_Head from Management M inner join positions P on P.positionId = M.positionId inner join Employees E on E.positionId = P.positionId where E.fullName = 'Linda Green'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?department_head WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?e a :Employees .
  ?e p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?m p:Department_Head ?department_head .
  ?e p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "Linda Green")
}

queries.question: List all the department heads in Company B.
queries.sql: select distinct M.Department_Head from Management M inner join positions P on P.positionId = M.positionId inner join Teams T on T.teamId = P.TeamId inner join Departments D on D.deptId = T.deptId inner join Companies C on C.companyId = D.companyId where C.name = 'Company B'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?department_head WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Department_Head ?department_head .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
}

queries.question: List all the department heads in Company B and team leaders in the same company.
queries.sql: select distinct M.Department_Head, Team_Leader from Management M inner join positions P on P.positionId = M.positionId inner join Teams T on T.teamId = P.TeamId inner join Departments D on D.deptId = T.deptId inner join Companies C on C.companyId = D.companyId where C.name = 'Company B'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?department_head ?team_leader WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Department_Head ?department_head .
  ?m p:Team_Leader ?team_leader .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
}

queries.question: List all the supervisors in Company B
queries.sql: select distinct M.Team_Leader from Management M inner join positions P on P.positionId = M.positionId inner join Teams T on T.teamId = P.TeamId inner join Departments D on D.deptId = T.deptId inner join Companies C on C.companyId = D.companyId where C.name = 'Company B'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?team_leader WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Team_Leader ?team_leader .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who is the supervisor of Linda Green?
List all the supervisors in Company B

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT DISTINCT ?department_head WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Department_Head ?department_head .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
} }
  full: { SELECT DISTINCT ?department_head ?team_leader WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Department_Head ?department_head .
  ?m p:Team_Leader ?team_leader .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT DISTINCT ?team_leader WHERE {
  ?m a :Management .
  ?p a :Position .
  ?m p:hasPositions ?p .
  ?t a :Teams .
  ?p p:hasTeams ?t .
  ?d a :Departments .
  ?t p:hasDepartments ?d .
  ?c a :Companies .
  ?d p:hasCompanies ?c .
  ?m p:Team_Leader ?team_leader .
  ?c p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Company B")
} }
}
